mermaid_code:
graph TD
  P1["Phase 1: Scheduler Foundation (`/aa-schedule`)"]:::done
  P2["Phase 2: Event-Driven Hooks"]:::done
  P3["Phase 3: Adaptive Repair Loop"]:::done
  P4["Phase 4: Task Chaining & Pipelines (`/aa-chain`)"]:::running
  P5["Phase 5: Multi-Project Dashboard & QA"]:::pending
  P1 --> P2
  P2 --> P3
  P3 --> P4
  P4 --> P5
  classDef done fill:#238636,color:white,stroke:none
  classDef running fill:#4ade80,color:black,stroke-width:3px,stroke:#fff
  classDef pending fill:#21262d,color:#8b949e,stroke:#30363d
  classDef fail fill:#f85149,color:white,stroke:none
